title: Ex-Twitter CEO Dick Costolo reacts to Eric Schmidt’s Commencement Booing
summary: Alex Kantrowitz covers a reaction from ex-Twitter CEO Dick Costolo to Eric Schmidt being booed at a commencement ceremony. The segment discusses sentiment and public perception around prominent tech figures and their roles.
